title: CREVENT Cute Silky Plush Baby Blanket for Girls Infants Toddlers Newborns Crib Cot Stroller, Giftable Suitable for Summer Spring (75cmX100cm Pink Elephant)
features: MATERIAL - Soft, lightweight, comfortable and fluffy flannel fleece blanket made 100% in accordance with OEKO-TEX standard. Unique and special design for baby, unisex. Suitable for summer and spring.
Size: 75 x 100 cm. You can use it anywhere and for whatever you want: in the car, in the crib, in the stroller, in bed, on the street, traveling, in the office, for changing diapers, etc.
GIFT BOXED - Great gift idea for newborn babies, toddlers, pets, dogs, cats, etc. for Christmas, birthday party, new year or maternity party.
Easy to maintain, machine washable and dryer-safe.
